description: Android platform permissions parsed from the AOSP platform manifest for the latest published release branch, with each permission's protection level and (where Android defines one) its official user-facing label and description from the platform strings. Maintained for the bayton.org APK inspector and provided as a stable API. inspectorMap collapses each protectionLevel to a single code (d=dangerous, n=normal, s=signature, p=signature|privileged, i=internal, a=appop, x=other); inspectorText carries the official description (or label) where one exists.

android.permission.READ_CONTACTS.label: read your contacts
android.permission.READ_CONTACTS.description: Allows the app to read data about your contacts stored on your phone. Apps will also have access to the accounts on your phone that have created contacts. This may include accounts created by apps you have installed. This permission allows apps to save your contact data, and malicious apps may share contact data without your knowledge.

android.permission.WRITE_CONTACTS.label: modify your contacts
android.permission.WRITE_CONTACTS.description: Allows the app to modify the data about your contacts stored on your phone. This permission allows apps to delete contact data.

android.permission.WRITE_VERIFICATION_ST.label: update the verification states of E2EE contact keys owned by other apps
android.permission.WRITE_VERIFICATION_ST.description: Allows the app to update the verification states of E2EE contact keys owned by other apps

android.permission.READ_CALENDAR.label: Read calendar events and details
android.permission.READ_CALENDAR.description: This app can read all calendar events stored on your phone and share or save your calendar data.

android.permission.WRITE_CALENDAR.label: add or modify calendar events and send email to guests without owners' knowledge
android.permission.WRITE_CALENDAR.description: This app can add, remove, or change calendar events on your phone. This app can send messages that may appear to come from calendar owners, or change events without notifying their owners.

android.permission.SEND_SMS.label: send and view SMS messages
android.permission.SEND_SMS.description: Allows the app to send SMS messages. This may result in unexpected charges. Malicious apps may cost you money by sending messages without your confirmation.

android.permission.RECEIVE_SMS.label: receive text messages (SMS)
android.permission.RECEIVE_SMS.description: Allows the app to receive and process SMS messages. This means the app could monitor or delete messages sent to your device without showing them to you.

android.permission.READ_SMS.label: read your text messages (SMS or MMS)
android.permission.READ_SMS.description: This app can read all SMS (text) messages stored on your phone.

android.permission.RECEIVE_WAP_PUSH.label: receive text messages (WAP)
android.permission.RECEIVE_WAP_PUSH.description: Allows the app to receive and process WAP messages. This permission includes the ability to monitor or delete messages sent to you without showing them to you.

android.permission.RECEIVE_MMS.label: receive text messages (MMS)
android.permission.RECEIVE_MMS.description: Allows the app to receive and process MMS messages. This means the app could monitor or delete messages sent to your device without showing them to you.

android.permission.BIND_CELL_BROADCAST_S.label: Forward cell broadcast messages
android.permission.BIND_CELL_BROADCAST_S.description: Allows the app to bind to the cell broadcast module in order to forward cell broadcast messages as they are received. Cell broadcast alerts are delivered in some locations to warn you of emergency situations. Malicious apps may interfere with the performance or operation of your device when an emergency cell broadcast is received.

android.permission.READ_CELL_BROADCASTS.label: read cell broadcast messages
android.permission.READ_CELL_BROADCASTS.description: Allows the app to read cell broadcast messages received by your device. Cell broadcast alerts are delivered in some locations to warn you of emergency situations. Malicious apps may interfere with the performance or operation of your device when an emergency cell broadcast is received.

android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.label: read the contents of your shared storage
android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.description: Allows the app to read the contents of your shared storage.

android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO.label: read audio files from shared storage
android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO.description: Allows the app to read audio files from your shared storage.

android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO.label: read video files from shared storage
android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO.description: Allows the app to read video files from your shared storage.

android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES.label: read image files from shared storage
android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES.description: Allows the app to read image files from your shared storage.

android.permission.READ_MEDIA_DOCUMENTS.label: read document files from shared storage
android.permission.READ_MEDIA_DOCUMENTS.description: Allows the app to read document files from your shared storage.

android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USE.label: read user selected image and video files from shared storage
android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USE.description: Allows the app to read image and video files that you select from your shared storage.

android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAG.label: modify or delete the contents of your shared storage
android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAG.description: Allows the app to write the contents of your shared storage.

android.permission.ACCESS_MEDIA_LOCATION.label: read locations from your media collection
android.permission.ACCESS_MEDIA_LOCATION.description: Allows the app to read locations from your media collection.

android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.label: access precise location only in the foreground
android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.description: This app can get your precise location from location services while the app is in use. Location services for your device must be turned on for the app to get location. This may increase battery usage.

android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATIO.label: access approximate location only in the foreground
android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATIO.description: This app can get your approximate location from location services while the app is in use. Location services for your device must be turned on for the app to get location.

android.permission.ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOC.label: access location in the background
android.permission.ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOC.description: This app can access location at any time, even while the app is not in use.

android.permission.ACCESS_IMS_CALL_SERVI.label: access IMS call service
android.permission.ACCESS_IMS_CALL_SERVI.description: Allows the app to use the IMS service to make calls without your intervention.

android.permission.READ_CALL_LOG.label: read call log
android.permission.READ_CALL_LOG.description: This app can read your call history.

android.permission.WRITE_CALL_LOG.label: write call log
android.permission.WRITE_CALL_LOG.description: Allows the app to modify your phone's call log, including data about incoming and outgoing calls. Malicious apps may use this to erase or modify your call log.

android.permission.PROCESS_OUTGOING_CALL.label: reroute outgoing calls
android.permission.PROCESS_OUTGOING_CALL.description: Allows the app to see the number being dialed during an outgoing call with the option to redirect the call to a different number or abort the call altogether.

android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE.label: read phone status and identity
android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE.description: Allows the app to access the phone features of the device. This permission allows the app to determine the phone number and device IDs, whether a call is active, and the remote number connected by a call.

android.permission.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STAT.label: read basic telephony status and identity
android.permission.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STAT.description: Allows the app to access the basic telephony features of the device.

android.permission.READ_PHONE_NUMBERS.label: read phone numbers
android.permission.READ_PHONE_NUMBERS.description: Allows the app to access the phone numbers of the device.

android.permission.CALL_PHONE.label: directly call phone numbers
android.permission.CALL_PHONE.description: Allows the app to call phone numbers without your intervention. This may result in unexpected charges or calls. Note that this doesn't allow the app to call emergency numbers. Malicious apps may cost you money by making calls without your confirmation, or dial carrier codes which cause incoming calls to be automatically forwarded to another number.

com.android.voicemail.permission.ADD_VOI.label: add voicemail
com.android.voicemail.permission.ADD_VOI.description: Allows the app to add messages to your voicemail inbox.

android.permission.USE_SIP.label: make/receive SIP calls
android.permission.USE_SIP.description: Allows the app to make and receive SIP calls.

android.permission.ANSWER_PHONE_CALLS.label: answer phone calls
android.permission.ANSWER_PHONE_CALLS.description: Allows the app to answer an incoming phone call.

android.permission.MANAGE_OWN_CALLS.label: route calls through the system
android.permission.MANAGE_OWN_CALLS.description: Allows the app to route its calls through the system in order to improve the calling experience.

android.permission.CALL_COMPANION_APP.label: see and control calls through the system.
android.permission.CALL_COMPANION_APP.description: Allows the app to see and control ongoing calls on the device. This includes information such as call numbers for calls and the state of the calls.

android.permission.EXEMPT_FROM_AUDIO_REC.label: exempt from audio record restrictions
android.permission.EXEMPT_FROM_AUDIO_REC.description: Exempt the app from restrictions to record audio.

android.permission.ACCEPT_HANDOVER.description: Allows the app to continue a call which was started in another app.

android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO.label: record audio
android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO.description: This app can record audio using the microphone while the app is in use.

android.permission.RECORD_BACKGROUND_AUD.label: record audio in the background
android.permission.RECORD_BACKGROUND_AUD.description: This app can record audio using the microphone at any time.

android.permission.ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION.label: recognize physical activity
android.permission.ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION.description: This app can recognize your physical activity.

android.permission.CAMERA.label: take pictures and videos
android.permission.CAMERA.description: This app can take pictures and record videos using the camera while the app is in use.

android.permission.BACKGROUND_CAMERA.label: take pictures and videos in the background
android.permission.BACKGROUND_CAMERA.description: This app can take pictures and record videos using the camera at any time.

android.permission.SYSTEM_CAMERA.label: Allow an application or service access to system cameras to take pictures and videos
android.permission.SYSTEM_CAMERA.description: This privileged or system app can take pictures and record videos using a system camera at any time. Requires the android.permission.CAMERA permission to be held by the app as well

android.permission.WARM_UP_CAMERA.label: Allow an application or service to send a warm up signal to the camera sub-system
android.permission.WARM_UP_CAMERA.description: This privileged or system app can send a signal to the camera sub system in order to warm up a camera device to help with performance amongst other benefits

android.permission.CAMERA_OPEN_CLOSE_LIS.label: Allow an application or service to receive callbacks about camera devices being opened or closed.
android.permission.CAMERA_OPEN_CLOSE_LIS.description: This app can receive callbacks when any camera device is being opened (by what application) or closed.

android.permission.CAMERA_HEADLESS_SYSTE.label: Allow an application or service to access camera as Headless System User.
android.permission.CAMERA_HEADLESS_SYSTE.description: This app can access camera as Headless System User.

android.permission.HIGH_SAMPLING_RATE_SE.label: access sensor data at a high sampling rate
android.permission.HIGH_SAMPLING_RATE_SE.description: Allows the app to sample sensor data at a rate greater than 200 Hz

android.permission.BODY_SENSORS.label: Access body sensor data, like heart rate, while in use
android.permission.BODY_SENSORS.description: Allows the app to access body sensor data, such as heart rate, temperature, and blood oxygen percentage, while the app is in use.

android.permission.BODY_SENSORS_BACKGROU.label: Access body sensor data, like heart rate, while in the background
android.permission.BODY_SENSORS_BACKGROU.description: Allows the app to access body sensor data, such as heart rate, temperature, and blood oxygen percentage, while the app is in the background.

android.permission.USE_FINGERPRINT.label: use fingerprint hardware
android.permission.USE_FINGERPRINT.description: Allows the app to use fingerprint hardware for authentication

android.permission.USE_BIOMETRIC.label: use biometric hardware
android.permission.USE_BIOMETRIC.description: Allows the app to use biometric hardware for authentication

android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS.label: show notifications
android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS.description: Allows the app to show notifications

com.android.alarm.permission.SET_ALARM.label: set an alarm
com.android.alarm.permission.SET_ALARM.description: Allows the app to set an alarm in an installed alarm clock app. Some alarm clock apps may not implement this feature.

android.permission.ACCESS_LOCATION_EXTRA.label: access extra location provider commands
android.permission.ACCESS_LOCATION_EXTRA.description: Allows the app to access extra location provider commands. This may allow the app to interfere with the operation of the GPS or other location sources.

android.permission.INTERNET.label: have full network access
android.permission.INTERNET.description: Allows the app to create network sockets and use custom network protocols. The browser and other applications provide means to send data to the internet, so this permission is not required to send data to the internet.

android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE.label: view network connections
android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE.description: Allows the app to view information about network connections such as which networks exist and are connected.

android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE.label: view Wi-Fi connections
android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE.description: Allows the app to view information about Wi-Fi networking, such as whether Wi-Fi is enabled and name of connected Wi-Fi devices.

android.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE.label: connect and disconnect from Wi-Fi
android.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE.description: Allows the app to connect to and disconnect from Wi-Fi access points and to make changes to device configuration for Wi-Fi networks.

android.permission.BLUETOOTH.label: pair with Bluetooth devices
android.permission.BLUETOOTH.description: Allows the app to view the configuration of the Bluetooth on the phone, and to make and accept connections with paired devices.

android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN.label: discover and pair nearby Bluetooth devices
android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN.description: Allows the app to discover and pair nearby Bluetooth devices

android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT.label: connect to paired Bluetooth devices
android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT.description: Allows the app to connect to paired Bluetooth devices

android.permission.BLUETOOTH_ADVERTISE.label: advertise to nearby Bluetooth devices
android.permission.BLUETOOTH_ADVERTISE.description: Allows the app to advertise to nearby Bluetooth devices

android.permission.UWB_RANGING.label: determine relative position between nearby Ultra-Wideband devices
android.permission.UWB_RANGING.description: Allow the app to determine relative position between nearby Ultra-Wideband devices

android.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES.label: interact with nearby Wi\u2011Fi devices
android.permission.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES.description: Allows the app to advertise, connect, and determine the relative position of nearby Wi\u2011Fi devices

android.permission.ACCESS_LOCAL_NETWORK.label: access local network devices
android.permission.ACCESS_LOCAL_NETWORK.description: Allows the app to access local network devices

android.permission.RANGING.label: determine relative position between nearby devices
android.permission.RANGING.description: Allow the app to determine relative position between nearby devices

android.permission.BLUETOOTH_ADMIN.label: access Bluetooth settings
android.permission.BLUETOOTH_ADMIN.description: Allows the app to configure the local Bluetooth phone, and to discover and pair with remote devices.

android.permission.NFC.label: control Near Field Communication
android.permission.NFC.description: Allows the app to communicate with Near Field Communication (NFC) tags, cards, and readers.

android.permission.NFC_TRANSACTION_EVENT.label: Secure Element transaction event
android.permission.NFC_TRANSACTION_EVENT.description: Allows the app to receive information about transactions happening on a Secure Element.

android.permission.NFC_PREFERRED_PAYMENT.label: Preferred NFC Payment Service Information
android.permission.NFC_PREFERRED_PAYMENT.description: Allows the app to get preferred nfc payment service information like registered aids and route destination.

android.permission.GET_ACCOUNTS.label: find accounts on the device
android.permission.GET_ACCOUNTS.description: Allows the app to get the list of accounts known by the phone. This may include any accounts created by applications you have installed.

android.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_MULTICAST.label: allow Wi-Fi Multicast reception
android.permission.CHANGE_WIFI_MULTICAST.description: Allows the app to receive packets sent to all devices on a Wi-Fi network using multicast addresses, not just your phone. It uses more power than the non-multicast mode.

android.permission.VIBRATE.label: control vibration
android.permission.VIBRATE.description: Allows the app to control the vibrator.

android.permission.ACCESS_VIBRATOR_STATE.label: Allows the app to access the vibrator state.
android.permission.ACCESS_VIBRATOR_STATE.description: Allows the app to access the vibrator state.

android.permission.WAKE_LOCK.label: prevent phone from sleeping
android.permission.WAKE_LOCK.description: Allows the app to prevent the phone from going to sleep.

android.permission.TRANSMIT_IR.label: transmit infrared
android.permission.TRANSMIT_IR.description: Allows the app to use the phone's infrared transmitter.

android.permission.TURN_SCREEN_ON.label: turn on the screen
android.permission.TURN_SCREEN_ON.description: Allows the app to turn on the screen.

android.permission.MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS.label: change your audio settings
android.permission.MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS.description: Allows the app to modify global audio settings such as volume and which speaker is used for output.

android.permission.DETECT_SCREEN_CAPTURE.label: detect screen captures of app windows
android.permission.DETECT_SCREEN_CAPTURE.description: This app will get notified when a screenshot is taken while the app is in use.

android.permission.MANAGE_ONGOING_CALLS.label: Manage ongoing calls
android.permission.MANAGE_ONGOING_CALLS.description: Allows an app to see details about ongoing calls on your device and to control these calls.

android.permission.ACCESS_LAST_KNOWN_CEL.label: Access last known cell identity.
android.permission.ACCESS_LAST_KNOWN_CEL.description: Allows an app to access to the last known cell identity provided by telephony.

android.permission.DISABLE_KEYGUARD.label: disable your screen lock
android.permission.DISABLE_KEYGUARD.description: Allows the app to disable the keylock and any associated password security. For example, the phone disables the keylock when receiving an incoming phone call, then re-enables the keylock when the call is finished.

android.permission.REQUEST_PASSWORD_COMP.label: request screen lock complexity
android.permission.REQUEST_PASSWORD_COMP.description: Allows the app to learn the screen lock complexity level (high, medium, low or none), which indicates the possible range of length and type of the screen lock. The app can also suggest to users that they update the screen lock to a certain level but users can freely ignore and navigate away. Note that the screen lock is not stored in plaintext so the app does not know the exact password.

android.permission.GET_TASKS.label: retrieve running apps
android.permission.GET_TASKS.description: Allows the app to retrieve information about currently and recently running tasks. This may allow the app to discover information about which applications are used on the device.

android.permission.ACCESS_HIDDEN_PROFILE.label: Access hidden profiles
android.permission.ACCESS_HIDDEN_PROFILE.description: Allows the app to access hidden profiles.

android.permission.USE_LOOPBACK_INTERFAC.label: use loopback interface
android.permission.USE_LOOPBACK_INTERFAC.description: Allows the app to interact with other apps over loopback interface

android.permission.FORCE_USE_LOOPBACK_IN.label: force use loopback interface
android.permission.FORCE_USE_LOOPBACK_IN.description: Allows the app to interact with other apps over loopback interface without requiring the other app to hold loopback permissions

android.permission.MANAGE_PROFILE_AND_DE.label: manage profile and device owners
android.permission.MANAGE_PROFILE_AND_DE.description: Allows apps to set the profile owners and the device owner.

android.permission.REORDER_TASKS.label: reorder running apps
android.permission.REORDER_TASKS.description: Allows the app to move tasks to the foreground and background. The app may do this without your input.

android.permission.RESTART_PACKAGES.label: close other apps
android.permission.RESTART_PACKAGES.description: Allows the app to end background processes of other apps. This may cause other apps to stop running.

android.permission.KILL_BACKGROUND_PROCE.label: close other apps
android.permission.KILL_BACKGROUND_PROCE.description: Allows the app to end background processes of other apps. This may cause other apps to stop running.

android.permission.KILL_ALL_BACKGROUND_P.label: close other apps
android.permission.KILL_ALL_BACKGROUND_P.description: Allows the app to end background processes of other apps. This may cause other apps to stop running.

android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW.label: This app can appear on top of other apps
android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW.description: This app can appear on top of other apps or other parts of the screen. This may interfere with normal app usage and change the way that other apps appear.

android.permission.RUN_IN_BACKGROUND.label: run in the background
android.permission.RUN_IN_BACKGROUND.description: This app can run in the background. This may drain battery faster.

android.permission.USE_DATA_IN_BACKGROUN.label: use data in the background
android.permission.USE_DATA_IN_BACKGROUN.description: This app can use data in the background. This may increase data usage.

android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_RUN.label: run in the background
android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_RUN.description: This app can run in the background. This may drain battery faster.

android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_STA.label: Start foreground services from background
android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_STA.description: Allows a companion app to start foreground services from background.

android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_USE.label: use data in the background
android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_USE.description: This app can use data in the background. This may increase data usage.

android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_PRO.label: Companion Watch profile permission to manage watches
android.permission.REQUEST_COMPANION_PRO.description: Allows a companion app to manage watches.

android.permission.HIDE_OVERLAY_WINDOWS.label: hide other apps overlays
android.permission.HIDE_OVERLAY_WINDOWS.description: This app can request that the system hides overlays originating from apps from being shown on top of it.

android.permission.SET_WALLPAPER.label: set wallpaper
android.permission.SET_WALLPAPER.description: Allows the app to set the system wallpaper.

android.permission.SET_WALLPAPER_HINTS.label: adjust your wallpaper size
android.permission.SET_WALLPAPER_HINTS.description: Allows the app to set the system wallpaper size hints.

android.permission.SET_TIME_ZONE.label: set time zone
android.permission.SET_TIME_ZONE.description: Allows the app to change the phone's time zone.

android.permission.EXPAND_STATUS_BAR.label: expand/collapse status bar
android.permission.EXPAND_STATUS_BAR.description: Allows the app to expand or collapse the status bar.

com.android.launcher.permission.INSTALL_.label: install shortcuts
com.android.launcher.permission.INSTALL_.description: Allows an application to add Homescreen shortcuts without user intervention.

com.android.launcher.permission.UNINSTAL.label: uninstall shortcuts
com.android.launcher.permission.UNINSTAL.description: Allows the application to remove Homescreen shortcuts without user intervention.

android.permission.READ_SYNC_SETTINGS.label: read sync settings
android.permission.READ_SYNC_SETTINGS.description: Allows the app to read the sync settings for an account. For example, this can determine whether the People app is synced with an account.

android.permission.WRITE_SYNC_SETTINGS.label: toggle sync on and off
android.permission.WRITE_SYNC_SETTINGS.description: Allows an app to modify the sync settings for an account. For example, this can be used to enable sync of the People app with an account.

android.permission.READ_SYNC_STATS.label: read sync statistics
android.permission.READ_SYNC_STATS.description: Allows an app to read the sync stats for an account, including the history of sync events and how much data is synced.

android.permission.WRITE_SETTINGS.label: modify system settings
android.permission.WRITE_SETTINGS.description: Allows the app to modify the system's settings data. Malicious apps may corrupt your system's configuration.

android.permission.PERSISTENT_ACTIVITY.label: make app always run
android.permission.PERSISTENT_ACTIVITY.description: Allows the app to make parts of itself persistent in memory. This can limit memory available to other apps slowing down the phone.

android.permission.GET_PACKAGE_SIZE.label: measure app storage space
android.permission.GET_PACKAGE_SIZE.description: Allows the app to retrieve its code, data, and cache sizes

android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETE.label: run at startup
android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETE.description: Allows the app to have itself started as soon as the system has finished booting. This can make it take longer to start the phone and allow the app to slow down the overall phone by always running.

android.permission.BROADCAST_STICKY.label: send sticky broadcast
android.permission.BROADCAST_STICKY.description: Allows the app to send sticky broadcasts, which remain after the broadcast ends. Excessive use may make the phone slow or unstable by causing it to use too much memory.

android.permission.CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE.label: change network connectivity
android.permission.CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE.description: Allows the app to change the state of network connectivity.

android.permission.EYE_TRACKING_COARSE.label: track eye movement
android.permission.EYE_TRACKING_COARSE.description: Allows the app to track the approximate direction of your gaze.

android.permission.FACE_TRACKING.label: track facial movements
android.permission.FACE_TRACKING.description: Allows the app to track your facial movements and expressions.

android.permission.HAND_TRACKING.label: track hand movements
android.permission.HAND_TRACKING.description: Allows the app to track your hand movements.

android.permission.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING_C.label: scan your surrounding area
android.permission.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING_C.description: Allows the app to scan your surroundings.

android.permission.EYE_TRACKING_FINE.label: precisely track eye movement
android.permission.EYE_TRACKING_FINE.description: Allows the app to track the direction of your gaze.

android.permission.HEAD_TRACKING.label: track head movements
android.permission.HEAD_TRACKING.description: Allows the app to track your head movements.

android.permission.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING_F.label: precisely scan your surrounding area
android.permission.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING_F.description: Allows the app to precisely scan your surroundings.

android.permission.XR_TRACKING_IN_BACKGR.label: access XR tracking in the background
android.permission.XR_TRACKING_IN_BACKGR.description: Allows the app to access XR data in the background.

android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM.label: Schedule precisely timed actions
android.permission.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM.description: This app can schedule work to happen at a desired time in the future. This also means that the app can run when you\u2019re not actively using the device.

android.permission.USE_EXACT_ALARM.label: Schedule alarms or event reminders
android.permission.USE_EXACT_ALARM.description: This app can schedule actions like alarms and reminders to notify you at a desired time in the future.

android.permission.REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKA.label: request install packages
android.permission.REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKA.description: Allows an application to request installation of packages.

android.permission.REQUEST_DELETE_PACKAG.label: request delete packages
android.permission.REQUEST_DELETE_PACKAG.description: Allows an application to request deletion of packages.

android.permission.REQUEST_OBSERVE_COMPA.label: Observe companion device presence
android.permission.REQUEST_OBSERVE_COMPA.description: Allows a companion app to observe companion device presence when the devices are nearby or far-away.

android.permission.DELIVER_COMPANION_MES.label: Deliver companion messages
android.permission.DELIVER_COMPANION_MES.description: Allows a companion app to deliver companion messages to other devices.

android.permission.REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTER.label: ask to ignore battery optimizations
android.permission.REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTER.description: Allows an app to ask for permission to ignore battery optimizations for that app.

android.permission.ACCESS_NOTIFICATION_P.label: access Do Not Disturb
android.permission.ACCESS_NOTIFICATION_P.description: Allows the app to read and write Do Not Disturb configuration.

android.permission.READ_INSTALL_SESSIONS.label: read install sessions
android.permission.READ_INSTALL_SESSIONS.description: Allows an application to read install sessions. This allows it to see details about active package installations.

android.permission.BIND_CARRIER_SERVICES.label: bind to carrier services
android.permission.BIND_CARRIER_SERVICES.description: Allows the holder to bind to carrier services. Should never be needed for normal apps.

android.permission.START_VIEW_PERMISSION.label: start view permission usage
android.permission.START_VIEW_PERMISSION.description: Allows the holder to start the permission usage for an app. Should never be needed for normal apps.

android.permission.START_REVIEW_PERMISSI.label: start view permission decisions
android.permission.START_REVIEW_PERMISSI.description: Allows the holder to start screen to review permission decisions. Should never be needed for normal apps.

android.permission.START_VIEW_APP_FEATUR.label: start view app features
android.permission.START_VIEW_APP_FEATUR.description: Allows the holder to start viewing the features info for an app.

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE.label: run foreground service
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services.

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_CA.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "camera

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_CO.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "connectedDevice

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DA.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "dataSync

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_LO.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "location

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_ME.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "mediaPlayback

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_ME.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "mediaProjection

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_MI.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "microphone

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_PH.label: run foreground service with the type "phoneCall
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_PH.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "phoneCall

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_HE.label: run foreground service with the type "health
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_HE.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "health

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_RE.label: run foreground service with the type "remoteMessaging
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_RE.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "remoteMessaging

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_SY.label: run foreground service with the type "systemExempted
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_SY.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "systemExempted

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_FI.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "fileManagement

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_ME.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "mediaProcessing

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_SP.description: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "specialUse

android.permission.USE_FULL_SCREEN_INTEN.label: display notifications as full screen activities on a locked device
android.permission.USE_FULL_SCREEN_INTEN.description: Allows the app to display notifications as full screen activities on a locked device

android.permission.POST_PROMOTED_NOTIFIC.label: Show live updates
android.permission.POST_PROMOTED_NOTIFIC.description: Allows the app to display ongoing, time-sensitive notifications on the status bar and lock screen

android.permission.QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES.label: query all packages
android.permission.QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES.description: Allows an app to see all installed packages.

android.permission.UPDATE_PACKAGES_WITHO.label: update app without user action
android.permission.UPDATE_PACKAGES_WITHO.description: Allows the holder to update the app it previously installed without user action

android.permission.CAPTURE_KEYBOARD.label: capture keys
android.permission.CAPTURE_KEYBOARD.description: Allows the app to capture keys before system can process system shortcuts and actions.

inspectorText.READ_CONTACTS: Allows the app to read data about your contacts stored on your phone. Apps will also have access to the accounts on your phone that have created contacts. This may include accounts created by apps you have installed. This permission allows apps to save your contact data, and malicious apps may share contact data without your knowledge.
inspectorText.WRITE_CONTACTS: Allows the app to modify the data about your contacts stored on your phone. This permission allows apps to delete contact data.
inspectorText.WRITE_VERIFICATION_STATE_E2EE_CONTACT_KE: Allows the app to update the verification states of E2EE contact keys owned by other apps
inspectorText.READ_CALENDAR: This app can read all calendar events stored on your phone and share or save your calendar data.
inspectorText.WRITE_CALENDAR: This app can add, remove, or change calendar events on your phone. This app can send messages that may appear to come from calendar owners, or change events without notifying their owners.
inspectorText.SEND_SMS: Allows the app to send SMS messages. This may result in unexpected charges. Malicious apps may cost you money by sending messages without your confirmation.
inspectorText.RECEIVE_SMS: Allows the app to receive and process SMS messages. This means the app could monitor or delete messages sent to your device without showing them to you.
inspectorText.READ_SMS: This app can read all SMS (text) messages stored on your phone.
inspectorText.RECEIVE_WAP_PUSH: Allows the app to receive and process WAP messages. This permission includes the ability to monitor or delete messages sent to you without showing them to you.
inspectorText.RECEIVE_MMS: Allows the app to receive and process MMS messages. This means the app could monitor or delete messages sent to your device without showing them to you.
inspectorText.BIND_CELL_BROADCAST_SERVICE: Allows the app to bind to the cell broadcast module in order to forward cell broadcast messages as they are received. Cell broadcast alerts are delivered in some locations to warn you of emergency situations. Malicious apps may interfere with the performance or operation of your device when an emergency cell broadcast is received.
inspectorText.READ_CELL_BROADCASTS: Allows the app to read cell broadcast messages received by your device. Cell broadcast alerts are delivered in some locations to warn you of emergency situations. Malicious apps may interfere with the performance or operation of your device when an emergency cell broadcast is received.
inspectorText.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE: Allows the app to read the contents of your shared storage.
inspectorText.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO: Allows the app to read audio files from your shared storage.
inspectorText.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO: Allows the app to read video files from your shared storage.
inspectorText.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES: Allows the app to read image files from your shared storage.
inspectorText.READ_MEDIA_DOCUMENTS: Allows the app to read document files from your shared storage.
inspectorText.READ_MEDIA_VISUAL_USER_SELECTED: Allows the app to read image and video files that you select from your shared storage.
inspectorText.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE: Allows the app to write the contents of your shared storage.
inspectorText.ACCESS_MEDIA_LOCATION: Allows the app to read locations from your media collection.
inspectorText.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION: This app can get your precise location from location services while the app is in use. Location services for your device must be turned on for the app to get location. This may increase battery usage.
inspectorText.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION: This app can get your approximate location from location services while the app is in use. Location services for your device must be turned on for the app to get location.
inspectorText.ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION: This app can access location at any time, even while the app is not in use.
inspectorText.ACCESS_IMS_CALL_SERVICE: Allows the app to use the IMS service to make calls without your intervention.
inspectorText.READ_CALL_LOG: This app can read your call history.
inspectorText.WRITE_CALL_LOG: Allows the app to modify your phone's call log, including data about incoming and outgoing calls. Malicious apps may use this to erase or modify your call log.
inspectorText.PROCESS_OUTGOING_CALLS: Allows the app to see the number being dialed during an outgoing call with the option to redirect the call to a different number or abort the call altogether.
inspectorText.READ_PHONE_STATE: Allows the app to access the phone features of the device. This permission allows the app to determine the phone number and device IDs, whether a call is active, and the remote number connected by a call.
inspectorText.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STATE: Allows the app to access the basic telephony features of the device.
inspectorText.READ_PHONE_NUMBERS: Allows the app to access the phone numbers of the device.
inspectorText.CALL_PHONE: Allows the app to call phone numbers without your intervention. This may result in unexpected charges or calls. Note that this doesn't allow the app to call emergency numbers. Malicious apps may cost you money by making calls without your confirmation, or dial carrier codes which cause incoming calls to be automatically forwarded to another number.
inspectorText.com.android.voicemail.permission.ADD_VOI: Allows the app to add messages to your voicemail inbox.
inspectorText.USE_SIP: Allows the app to make and receive SIP calls.
inspectorText.ANSWER_PHONE_CALLS: Allows the app to answer an incoming phone call.
inspectorText.MANAGE_OWN_CALLS: Allows the app to route its calls through the system in order to improve the calling experience.
inspectorText.CALL_COMPANION_APP: Allows the app to see and control ongoing calls on the device. This includes information such as call numbers for calls and the state of the calls.
inspectorText.EXEMPT_FROM_AUDIO_RECORD_RESTRICTIONS: Exempt the app from restrictions to record audio.
inspectorText.ACCEPT_HANDOVER: Allows the app to continue a call which was started in another app.
inspectorText.RECORD_AUDIO: This app can record audio using the microphone while the app is in use.
inspectorText.RECORD_BACKGROUND_AUDIO: This app can record audio using the microphone at any time.
inspectorText.ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION: This app can recognize your physical activity.
inspectorText.CAMERA: This app can take pictures and record videos using the camera while the app is in use.
inspectorText.BACKGROUND_CAMERA: This app can take pictures and record videos using the camera at any time.
inspectorText.SYSTEM_CAMERA: This privileged or system app can take pictures and record videos using a system camera at any time. Requires the android.permission.CAMERA permission to be held by the app as well
inspectorText.WARM_UP_CAMERA: This privileged or system app can send a signal to the camera sub system in order to warm up a camera device to help with performance amongst other benefits
inspectorText.CAMERA_OPEN_CLOSE_LISTENER: This app can receive callbacks when any camera device is being opened (by what application) or closed.
inspectorText.CAMERA_HEADLESS_SYSTEM_USER: This app can access camera as Headless System User.
inspectorText.HIGH_SAMPLING_RATE_SENSORS: Allows the app to sample sensor data at a rate greater than 200 Hz
inspectorText.BODY_SENSORS: Allows the app to access body sensor data, such as heart rate, temperature, and blood oxygen percentage, while the app is in use.
inspectorText.BODY_SENSORS_BACKGROUND: Allows the app to access body sensor data, such as heart rate, temperature, and blood oxygen percentage, while the app is in the background.
inspectorText.USE_FINGERPRINT: Allows the app to use fingerprint hardware for authentication
inspectorText.USE_BIOMETRIC: Allows the app to use biometric hardware for authentication
inspectorText.POST_NOTIFICATIONS: Allows the app to show notifications
inspectorText.com.android.alarm.permission.SET_ALARM: Allows the app to set an alarm in an installed alarm clock app. Some alarm clock apps may not implement this feature.
inspectorText.ACCESS_LOCATION_EXTRA_COMMANDS: Allows the app to access extra location provider commands. This may allow the app to interfere with the operation of the GPS or other location sources.
inspectorText.INTERNET: Allows the app to create network sockets and use custom network protocols. The browser and other applications provide means to send data to the internet, so this permission is not required to send data to the internet.
inspectorText.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE: Allows the app to view information about network connections such as which networks exist and are connected.
inspectorText.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE: Allows the app to view information about Wi-Fi networking, such as whether Wi-Fi is enabled and name of connected Wi-Fi devices.
inspectorText.CHANGE_WIFI_STATE: Allows the app to connect to and disconnect from Wi-Fi access points and to make changes to device configuration for Wi-Fi networks.
inspectorText.BLUETOOTH: Allows the app to view the configuration of the Bluetooth on the phone, and to make and accept connections with paired devices.
inspectorText.BLUETOOTH_SCAN: Allows the app to discover and pair nearby Bluetooth devices
inspectorText.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT: Allows the app to connect to paired Bluetooth devices
inspectorText.BLUETOOTH_ADVERTISE: Allows the app to advertise to nearby Bluetooth devices
inspectorText.UWB_RANGING: Allow the app to determine relative position between nearby Ultra-Wideband devices
inspectorText.NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES: Allows the app to advertise, connect, and determine the relative position of nearby Wi\u2011Fi devices
inspectorText.ACCESS_LOCAL_NETWORK: Allows the app to access local network devices
inspectorText.RANGING: Allow the app to determine relative position between nearby devices
inspectorText.BLUETOOTH_ADMIN: Allows the app to configure the local Bluetooth phone, and to discover and pair with remote devices.
inspectorText.NFC: Allows the app to communicate with Near Field Communication (NFC) tags, cards, and readers.
inspectorText.NFC_TRANSACTION_EVENT: Allows the app to receive information about transactions happening on a Secure Element.
inspectorText.NFC_PREFERRED_PAYMENT_INFO: Allows the app to get preferred nfc payment service information like registered aids and route destination.
inspectorText.GET_ACCOUNTS: Allows the app to get the list of accounts known by the phone. This may include any accounts created by applications you have installed.
inspectorText.CHANGE_WIFI_MULTICAST_STATE: Allows the app to receive packets sent to all devices on a Wi-Fi network using multicast addresses, not just your phone. It uses more power than the non-multicast mode.
inspectorText.VIBRATE: Allows the app to control the vibrator.
inspectorText.ACCESS_VIBRATOR_STATE: Allows the app to access the vibrator state.
inspectorText.WAKE_LOCK: Allows the app to prevent the phone from going to sleep.
inspectorText.TRANSMIT_IR: Allows the app to use the phone's infrared transmitter.
inspectorText.TURN_SCREEN_ON: Allows the app to turn on the screen.
inspectorText.MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS: Allows the app to modify global audio settings such as volume and which speaker is used for output.
inspectorText.DETECT_SCREEN_CAPTURE: This app will get notified when a screenshot is taken while the app is in use.
inspectorText.MANAGE_ONGOING_CALLS: Allows an app to see details about ongoing calls on your device and to control these calls.
inspectorText.ACCESS_LAST_KNOWN_CELL_ID: Allows an app to access to the last known cell identity provided by telephony.
inspectorText.DISABLE_KEYGUARD: Allows the app to disable the keylock and any associated password security. For example, the phone disables the keylock when receiving an incoming phone call, then re-enables the keylock when the call is finished.
inspectorText.REQUEST_PASSWORD_COMPLEXITY: Allows the app to learn the screen lock complexity level (high, medium, low or none), which indicates the possible range of length and type of the screen lock. The app can also suggest to users that they update the screen lock to a certain level but users can freely ignore and navigate away. Note that the screen lock is not stored in plaintext so the app does not know the exact password.
inspectorText.GET_TASKS: Allows the app to retrieve information about currently and recently running tasks. This may allow the app to discover information about which applications are used on the device.
inspectorText.ACCESS_HIDDEN_PROFILES: Allows the app to access hidden profiles.
inspectorText.USE_LOOPBACK_INTERFACE: Allows the app to interact with other apps over loopback interface
inspectorText.FORCE_USE_LOOPBACK_INTERFACE: Allows the app to interact with other apps over loopback interface without requiring the other app to hold loopback permissions
inspectorText.MANAGE_PROFILE_AND_DEVICE_OWNERS: Allows apps to set the profile owners and the device owner.
inspectorText.REORDER_TASKS: Allows the app to move tasks to the foreground and background. The app may do this without your input.
inspectorText.RESTART_PACKAGES: Allows the app to end background processes of other apps. This may cause other apps to stop running.
inspectorText.KILL_BACKGROUND_PROCESSES: Allows the app to end background processes of other apps. This may cause other apps to stop running.
inspectorText.KILL_ALL_BACKGROUND_PROCESSES: Allows the app to end background processes of other apps. This may cause other apps to stop running.
inspectorText.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW: This app can appear on top of other apps or other parts of the screen. This may interfere with normal app usage and change the way that other apps appear.
inspectorText.RUN_IN_BACKGROUND: This app can run in the background. This may drain battery faster.
inspectorText.USE_DATA_IN_BACKGROUND: This app can use data in the background. This may increase data usage.
inspectorText.REQUEST_COMPANION_RUN_IN_BACKGROUND: This app can run in the background. This may drain battery faster.
inspectorText.REQUEST_COMPANION_START_FOREGROUND_SERVI: Allows a companion app to start foreground services from background.
inspectorText.REQUEST_COMPANION_USE_DATA_IN_BACKGROUND: This app can use data in the background. This may increase data usage.
inspectorText.REQUEST_COMPANION_PROFILE_WATCH: Allows a companion app to manage watches.
inspectorText.HIDE_OVERLAY_WINDOWS: This app can request that the system hides overlays originating from apps from being shown on top of it.
inspectorText.SET_WALLPAPER: Allows the app to set the system wallpaper.
inspectorText.SET_WALLPAPER_HINTS: Allows the app to set the system wallpaper size hints.
inspectorText.SET_TIME_ZONE: Allows the app to change the phone's time zone.
inspectorText.EXPAND_STATUS_BAR: Allows the app to expand or collapse the status bar.
inspectorText.com.android.launcher.permission.INSTALL_: Allows an application to add Homescreen shortcuts without user intervention.
inspectorText.com.android.launcher.permission.UNINSTAL: Allows the application to remove Homescreen shortcuts without user intervention.
inspectorText.READ_SYNC_SETTINGS: Allows the app to read the sync settings for an account. For example, this can determine whether the People app is synced with an account.
inspectorText.WRITE_SYNC_SETTINGS: Allows an app to modify the sync settings for an account. For example, this can be used to enable sync of the People app with an account.
inspectorText.READ_SYNC_STATS: Allows an app to read the sync stats for an account, including the history of sync events and how much data is synced.
inspectorText.WRITE_SETTINGS: Allows the app to modify the system's settings data. Malicious apps may corrupt your system's configuration.
inspectorText.PERSISTENT_ACTIVITY: Allows the app to make parts of itself persistent in memory. This can limit memory available to other apps slowing down the phone.
inspectorText.GET_PACKAGE_SIZE: Allows the app to retrieve its code, data, and cache sizes
inspectorText.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED: Allows the app to have itself started as soon as the system has finished booting. This can make it take longer to start the phone and allow the app to slow down the overall phone by always running.
inspectorText.BROADCAST_STICKY: Allows the app to send sticky broadcasts, which remain after the broadcast ends. Excessive use may make the phone slow or unstable by causing it to use too much memory.
inspectorText.CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE: Allows the app to change the state of network connectivity.
inspectorText.EYE_TRACKING_COARSE: Allows the app to track the approximate direction of your gaze.
inspectorText.FACE_TRACKING: Allows the app to track your facial movements and expressions.
inspectorText.HAND_TRACKING: Allows the app to track your hand movements.
inspectorText.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING_COARSE: Allows the app to scan your surroundings.
inspectorText.EYE_TRACKING_FINE: Allows the app to track the direction of your gaze.
inspectorText.HEAD_TRACKING: Allows the app to track your head movements.
inspectorText.SCENE_UNDERSTANDING_FINE: Allows the app to precisely scan your surroundings.
inspectorText.XR_TRACKING_IN_BACKGROUND: Allows the app to access XR data in the background.
inspectorText.SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM: This app can schedule work to happen at a desired time in the future. This also means that the app can run when you\u2019re not actively using the device.
inspectorText.USE_EXACT_ALARM: This app can schedule actions like alarms and reminders to notify you at a desired time in the future.
inspectorText.REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES: Allows an application to request installation of packages.
inspectorText.REQUEST_DELETE_PACKAGES: Allows an application to request deletion of packages.
inspectorText.REQUEST_OBSERVE_COMPANION_DEVICE_PRESENC: Allows a companion app to observe companion device presence when the devices are nearby or far-away.
inspectorText.DELIVER_COMPANION_MESSAGES: Allows a companion app to deliver companion messages to other devices.
inspectorText.REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS: Allows an app to ask for permission to ignore battery optimizations for that app.
inspectorText.ACCESS_NOTIFICATION_POLICY: Allows the app to read and write Do Not Disturb configuration.
inspectorText.READ_INSTALL_SESSIONS: Allows an application to read install sessions. This allows it to see details about active package installations.
inspectorText.BIND_CARRIER_SERVICES: Allows the holder to bind to carrier services. Should never be needed for normal apps.
inspectorText.START_VIEW_PERMISSION_USAGE: Allows the holder to start the permission usage for an app. Should never be needed for normal apps.
inspectorText.START_REVIEW_PERMISSION_DECISIONS: Allows the holder to start screen to review permission decisions. Should never be needed for normal apps.
inspectorText.START_VIEW_APP_FEATURES: Allows the holder to start viewing the features info for an app.
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE: Allows the app to make use of foreground services.
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_CAMERA: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "camera
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_CONNECTED_DEVICE: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "connectedDevice
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_DATA_SYNC: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "dataSync
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_LOCATION: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "location
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_MEDIA_PLAYBACK: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "mediaPlayback
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_MEDIA_PROJECTION: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "mediaProjection
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_MICROPHONE: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "microphone
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_PHONE_CALL: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "phoneCall
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_HEALTH: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "health
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_REMOTE_MESSAGING: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "remoteMessaging
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_SYSTEM_EXEMPTED: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "systemExempted
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_FILE_MANAGEMENT: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "fileManagement
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_MEDIA_PROCESSING: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "mediaProcessing
inspectorText.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_SPECIAL_USE: Allows the app to make use of foreground services with the type "specialUse
inspectorText.USE_FULL_SCREEN_INTENT: Allows the app to display notifications as full screen activities on a locked device
inspectorText.POST_PROMOTED_NOTIFICATIONS: Allows the app to display ongoing, time-sensitive notifications on the status bar and lock screen
inspectorText.QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES: Allows an app to see all installed packages.
inspectorText.UPDATE_PACKAGES_WITHOUT_USER_ACTION: Allows the holder to update the app it previously installed without user action
inspectorText.CAPTURE_KEYBOARD: Allows the app to capture keys before system can process system shortcuts and actions.
